description_long: This object is a stylized airplane with a streamlined, elongated fuselage and sharply pointed nose and tail. The wings are straight and extend horizontally from the midsection, with a rectangular cross-section and no visible dihedral or anhedral angle. The surface is predominantly white with scattered blue markings along the fuselage, and there are two oval shapes at each end, possibly representing engine inlets or exhausts. The airplane features a simple vertical stabilizer at the rear and a single horizontal stabilizer, forming a conventional tail design. There are no visible windows, doors, or detailed landing gear, giving the object a minimalist and abstract appearance. The overall design suggests a lightweight, small-scale aircraft suitable for visual representation in urban environments.
description: A minimalist white airplane with blue markings, straight mid-mounted wings, and a conventional tail. The design is abstract, with simple geometric features and no visible windows or detailed landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, mid-mounted straight wings, blue markings, and oval shapes at the nose and tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, symmetrical wing extension, and two blue markings near the tip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing blue markings and the oval at the tail end.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the pointed tail, horizontal stabilizer, and symmetrical wing extension.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, rectangular wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines or propulsion units present.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No visible cockpit or window features present.
